column3: [Applause]
hey everyone
blaze is back with my phase 2 best and
slot guide
this guide will show a couple pieces for
each individual slot and describe how to
get them
i will also be putting my recommendation
for both a three percent and six percent
hit set
at the end of this video similar to my
phase one video
there are a couple items that will last
you almost throughout the entire game in
this tier
that are very important to get with that
said let's get into the phase 2 gear
for the helmet slot i will have two
recommendations one that relies on you
having engineering while the other does
not
the tier 5 helm crystal forge warhelm is
a great helm if you do not have
engineering
it drops as a token off of the last boss
and serpent shrine cavern
lady vosh however since i recommend
having engineering as a ret paladin
the engineering helm is obtainable in
phase 2.
furious gizmatic goggles are an amazing
helm that is best in slot overall this
phase
even over the tier v helm the hit on the
goggles are great for this tier along
with the crit
and strength it's crafted with 350
engineering and learned from the trainer
this helm will be your best and slot
helm until illidari council helm or
cursed vision
off of illidan the necklace slot i will
recommend
two different necks but i prefer one of
them the neck that i recommend
overall is pendant of the perilous this
necklace drops off of trash mobs in
serpent shrine cavern
it provides a great amount of attack
power and crit the reason i recommend
this necklace over tallonicus pendant of
mayhem
is for a couple reasons one you will
most likely not see the sphere
which provides the necklace off of kale
those for a long time
the other reason being that the tank
neck off of the sphere is quite amazing
and i would be tempted to get that
necklace over the dps one telonicus
provides a small boost in crit
and is a side grade from pendant of the
perilous you will use
pendant of the perilous possibly
throughout early tier 6 depending on
your hit and other items that you obtain
shoulder is a unique slot as in the best
slot item will be used all the way until
sunwell plateau
shoulder pads of the stranger that drop
off of hydros the unstable in serpent
shrine cavern
are amazing and insanely good these will
be used until
sunwell and they are heavily sought
after they provide a great balance of
attack
power crit and that amazing and rare
stat and expertise
you need to make it a priority to get
these along with the other expertise
items in phase 2.
my second recommendation will be the
shoulders that drop off of the same boss
pauldrons of the war dancer are okay
shoulders that get the job done
but in comparison to the leather ones
they are very underwhelming
these should hold you over until
stranger especially if your feral druid
gets the first pair of expertise
shoulders
cloak is a very minimal upgrade from
vengeance rap
the best and slot cloak razor scale
battle cloak
will drop off of morigrim tidewalker in
serpent shrine cavern
this cloak will last through early tier
vi depending on your need for hit
or not in tier vi velastian wielder
cloak
is also an option for back slot however
this is better suited for other classes
in the raid
for chest i will have three
recommendations starting with the bottom
two
kraken heart breastplate and ranger
general's chest guard
both are located in serpent shrine
cavern krakenheart breastplate
off of lady vosh and ranger general's
chest guard
off of hydros choosing between the two
depends on if you need hit
or not in this slot kraken is the hit
chest
and ranger generals is the non-hit chest
make sure you choose accordingly
if you cannot obtain your tier 5 chest
your phase 2 best and slot will be
crystal forged breastplate
the token drops off of kale those and
tempest keep and the chest
itself is amazing one red socket and two
yellows
or a four strength socket bonus with
crit and hit
makes this chest absolutely insane
overall you should be going for the tier
token
in this phase the bracers are a slot
that you can exchange based on if you
need hit or not
if you do not need hit in this slot
bladespire warbands from high king
malgar
and tier 4 will be your best and slot
bracers
if you currently need hit and you have
braces of eradication
from the lurker in serpent shrine cavern
those will be your best in slot
make note that you should aim to get
both of these bracers for this phase
similar to my recommendation of both
expertise pants in phase one
you never know if you will need the hit
grab them both
the gloves are a minor upgrade from the
phase 1 best and slot gloves
gloves of the searing grip drop off of
alar in tempest keep and provide
a little more expertise over the
karazhan gloves
grips of deafness grips of deafness are
still your second best slot in this
phase
you should just be aiming to upgrade
them with searing grip when possible
these gloves will last you throughout
early tier vi
make note that because they are a
marginal upgrade i would not prioritize
these higher than the other two
expertise pieces in this tier shoulder
pads of the stranger
and the amazing melee belt belt of 100
deaths
moving on to the belts as i previously
stated rhetts will be going after the
melee's wet dream belt
belt of 100 deaths this belt drops off
of lady vosh and serpent shrine cavern
and will be
highly contested you should prioritize
this item above
everything else in this phase this belt
is crazy good
it will be your best and slot belt until
the tier 6 belt in sunwell plateau
make sure if you need to you sell your
soul for this belt
if you happen to not have good belt luck
and you are in a situation where you are
never going to see the expertise belt
because you are a rep paladin
besides finding a new guild you can use
red belt of battle
it is a decent belt in the meantime
while you are waiting for a belt of 100
deaths
keep in mind that this belt uses two
nether vortexes to craft
for the legs i will have three choices
with a hit set recommendation
and two raw damage choices the legs that
i will be using in this tier are greaves
of the blood warder
and leggings of murderous intent reeves
at the blood water drop off of
astromancer solarian in tempest keep and
provide a fantastic amount of attack
power and crit
what makes these legs great is the three
sockets and the socket bonus being
plus four strength this is a great slot
to place in one of your blue gems in
order to activate your meta
the other legs that you can obtain in
the slot later in the phase when hunters
or other dps
have them are the leather legs off of
kel'thos and tempus keep
leggings of murderous intent these have
a lot more crit than blood water at the
expense of attack power in the gem slots
i will try to obtain both blood water
and murderous intent in this phase
with murderous intent looking slightly
better overall
my third recommendation is the tier 5
legs crystal forge greaves
these legs are great in a six percent
hit set
if you are going for both a three
percent and six percent hit set
i would try to obtain these legs as well
i will also give three recommendations
for boots the first ones
are the plate boots or boots of
obliteration they drop off of morogram
tidewalker in serpent shrine cavern
and will be the boots i recommend in the
beginning of tier 5.
they are plate boots that should see
minimal competition and should be fairly
easy to obtain
later on in tier 5 when your hunters
either have them
or you personally have good loot prio
you should be using one of the male
boots
star strider boots or cobra lash boots
the choice is up to you as their
offensive stats are similar
if you want mp5 go for starstrider if
you want more stamina and intellect go
for cobra lash
i personally will be going for whichever
lands in my bags first
your rings will have one staple item
while the other slot is depending on if
you need hit or not
the staple ring will be shape shifter
signet from lower city exalted
this ring is amazing and will be used
until late black temple or sunwell
plateau
if you don't have this ring make it your
number one priority outside of the raids
to obtain it
the second slot ring will be based on
your hit if you do not need the hit
you will be using ancestral ring of
conquest that drops off of the lurker in
serpent shrine cavern
this is the standard ring that gives
attack power and crit and is a great
second slot
if you do need the hit you should be
using one of the available hit rings
at your disposal this can be in order
from best to worst
band of the ranger general off of kel
thos and tempest keep
ring of lethality off of hydros in
serpent shrine cavern
or ring of a thousand marks off of
prince and karazhan
make sure to pick up one of these rings
just in case you need it
trinkets are something that i get asked
about a lot
your best in slot trinket one that you
will use
all the way until sunwell and all game
if you are human
is dragon spine trophy this drops off of
gruel in tier 4 and is similar to belt
of 100 deaths
something all melee players want
terribly you should be bending
over backwards to obtain this trinket
above all others
this is my heaviest recommended trinket
the second slot is up for discussion if
you are fighting an undead or demon boss
you should be using mark of the champion
from naxxramus
if the trinket is released in phase 2
which it could possibly be
you should obtain a darkmoon card
crusade this trinket is obtained through
the darkmoon faire
and is insane for fights where you are
constantly on the target
if there is movement or it has the
ability to drop off this trinket will
not be the best to use in this slot
the great thing about this trinket when
you are able to keep it up is that the
spell damage portion also stacks from
your auto attacks
this is through your auto attacks
refreshing your judgment of crusader on
the target
this acts as a faux spellcast that adds
a stack of spell damage from the
darkmoon card crusade
keep in mind that darkmancard crusade
has the possibility of costing an
absorbent amount
i would not be surprised if this trinket
costed to upwards
of 30 000 gold in the beginning the last
trinket and the one that i will be
primarily using in this phase is
bloodlust brooch
this is the standard trinket that is
bought with 41 badges of justice in
shattrath
bloodlust bruce is great for burst
fights and is fantastic for pairing with
wings
do not sleep on brooch in its cooldown
stacking ability
just to make sure that it's talked about
librium of avengement from heroic blood
furnace will always be your best in slot
libra
it deserves a little section here as a
reminder for everyone to go farm this
libra
for the weapons i will be talking about
two twin blade of the phoenix
and lionheart executioner starting with
twin blade of the phoenix
this will be your best and slot weapon
if you do not have blacksmithing
it provides three gem sockets that can
be beneficial but also a trap
if you use this weapon to activate your
metagem you will deactivate it
on kale those when using the legendary
two-handed axe devastation
comparing the two please note that with
a 30 up time on lionheart's buff
twin blade and lionheart's damage are on
par
as we have seen throughout phase one
lionheart's buff has the potential to
roll higher than 30
and often does as well that is why if
you are attempting to go for the highest
possible damage
with the capability of having good rng
rolls with your lionheart buff
lionheart executioner will be your best
and slot weapon
i will be using lionheart and going for
the high uptime rolls on its buff
keep in mind that lionheart's buff can
roll lower than 30
uptime therefore falling behind twin
blade in terms of relative dps
also if you want to drop blacksmithing
in phase 2 or you don't want to rely on
good rng
then twin blade is the weapon for you
here is what i am aiming to be running
at the end of phase 2 for my 3
hit set things to note about this set
you can swap out for greaves of the
blood water
if you are having trouble acquiring
leggings of murderous intent
for the boots you can also be using
cobra lash boots
or if you are also having trouble
getting those you can use
war boots of obliteration six percent
hit set uses the tier v
legs and the ring off of kale those you
can use any of the rings i listed prior
for the ring section
please note that there is a heroic hit
gem in the legs
giving you that extra bit to be hit
capped
thanks for watching everyone i'm so
hyped to get into tier 5 and start doing
some longer raids
the fights are going to be way more
engaging and the gear that is available
to us is way more exciting than tier 4.
as always if you like this content pop a
like on this video and subscribe
and if you want to come hang out and
talk rhett come hang out in my twitch
chat
or swing by the light club discord and
just remember
don't listen to the red haters and keep
on pumping
